questions.text: The sum of angles in a quadrilateral is:
questions.explanation: The sum of all interior angles of any quadrilateral is 360°.

questions.text: Diagonals of a rectangle are equal.
questions.explanation: In a rectangle, both diagonals are equal in length and bisect each other.

questions.correctAnswer: A polygon with all sides equal and all angles equal.
questions.explanation: A regular polygon has all sides of equal length and all interior angles of equal measure.

questions.text: A quadrilateral with one pair of parallel sides is called a ________.
questions.explanation: A trapezium has exactly one pair of parallel sides. If both pairs are parallel, it's a parallelogram.
